title: Super Simple Combat
description:
This Is My Super Simple combat plugin wich adds.
A combat timer when hit by a player/hit a player
Kills Player If player leaves the game during combat.
body: This plugin adds a combatlogg mecanism wich makes it so when one player hits another they are sent into combat. When you are sent into combat you are in it for 20 seconds. When in combat you cannot log out or you will be killed and you will be unable to do commands.
